task_description: Address Dependabot security alerts across two repositories by updating vulnerable Python and Node.js dependencies

features.description: Update vulnerable Python dependencies in aws-smart-product-onboarding repository
steps: Update urllib3 from ~1.26.7 to >=2.6.3 in packages/smart-product-onboarding/api/pyproject.toml (direct dependency)
Add cryptography>=46.0.5 constraint to packages/api/handlers/python/pyproject.toml (transitive via moto)
Add cryptography>=46.0.5 and Werkzeug>=3.1.5 constraints to packages/smart-product-onboarding/core-utils/pyproject.toml (transitive via moto)
Run 'poetry lock' in each affected package directory to regenerate lock files
Run 'poetry install' to verify dependencies resolve correctly
Run 'pnpm pdk build' from repository root to verify full build passes
Run tests using nx: 'pnpm exec nx run-many --target=test --all --outputStyle=stream'
Commit changes with message 'fix: update vulnerable Python dependencies (cryptography, urllib3, Werkzeug)'
acceptance_criteria: urllib3 version in lock files is >=2.6.3
cryptography version in lock files is >=46.0.5
Werkzeug version in lock files is >=3.1.5
All poetry.lock files are regenerated successfully

features.description: Update vulnerable Python and Node.js dependencies in sample-smart-prescription-reader repository
steps: Add version constraints to packages/core/pyproject.toml for: cryptography>=46.0.5, Werkzeug>=3.1.5, urllib3>=2.6.3, requests>=2.32.4
Run 'uv lock --upgrade-package cryptography --upgrade-package werkzeug --upgrade-package urllib3 --upgrade-package requests' in packages/core to update lock file
Update pnpm.overrides in root package.json: change koa from ^2.16.1 to ^2.16.2
Add tmp override >=0.2.4 to pnpm.overrides in root package.json
Run 'pnpm install' from repository root to regenerate pnpm-lock.yaml
Run 'pnpm exec nx run-many --target=build --all --outputStyle=stream' to verify builds pass
Run 'pnpm exec nx run-many --target=test --all --outputStyle=stream' to verify tests pass
Commit changes with message 'fix: update vulnerable dependencies (cryptography, Werkzeug, urllib3, requests, koa, tmp)'
acceptance_criteria: Python uv.lock shows cryptography>=46.0.5, Werkzeug>=3.1.5, urllib3>=2.6.3, requests>=2.32.4
All lock files are regenerated successfully
Build completes without errors for all packages
